summary: This is a brief classified-style post where DHH lists his 17-inch PowerBook G4 for sale at 18,500 DKK. He notes it is nine months old with specs nearly identical to the current model Apple sells for 25,540 DKK, offering a savings of about 7,000 DKK. The post is written entirely in Danish and includes practical details like the American keyboard layout and remaining warranty. He mentions the machine is available for pickup on June 21st, as he needs it until he departs.
key_points: DHH is selling a 17-inch PowerBook G4 1.33GHz with 1GB RAM and 80GB HD for 18,500 DKK
The machine is nearly identical to Apple's then-current model priced at 25,540 DKK, representing a ~7,000 DKK savings
The laptop has an American keyboard layout and about 4 months of worldwide warranty remaining
Available for pickup June 21st, suggesting DHH was about to travel or relocate
money_quotes: Så var det noget at spare ca. 7.000 kr. på en rigtig lækker maskine?
key_insight: A simple Danish-language classified ad from early in DHH's blogging history, offering his PowerBook for sale before a departure — notable only as a snapshot of his personal life circa mid-2004, likely around the time Rails was first gaining attention.
